nasb.text: their twenty pillars, and their twenty sockets, made of bronze; the hooks of the pillars and their bands were of silver.

esv.text: their twenty pillars and their twenty bases were of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver.

cnv.text: 幔幕的柱子有二十根，柱座有二十個，是銅做的；柱鉤和橫柱閂是銀做的。

ccb.text: 帷幔有二十根柱子，二十个带凹槽的铜底座，柱子上的钩子和横杆都是银的。
